summary: Builds a queue of MapTask objects for code review. Discovers source files, annotates them with git metadata (last modified date, dependencies changed more recently), and filters based on changed-only mode.

findings.description: If 'changed_only' is True and git diff fails, the function silently falls back to full scan. This could cause a large queue when the user expects only changed files, leading to wasted compute and time.
findings.evidence:
except Exception:
    pass  # fall back to full scan

findings.description: Multiple concurrent calls to build_queue could race when creating parent directories for output_path. This could cause 'FileExistsError' or other permission issues if mkdir is called simultaneously.

Dependency detection assumes Python modules map directly to files under repo_root. This breaks for packages (__init__.py), modules in subdirectories not matching import path, or modules with different file extensions.
findings.evidence:
candidate = imp.replace(".", "/") + ".py"
if candidate in changed_since:

findings.description: Subprocess timeout is 10 seconds. If git log --follow is slow on large repos, it will timeout and return None, losing git metadata. No retry or fallback.

The base_ref parameter is passed directly to git diff command without validation. A malicious or malformed ref could lead to shell injection if subprocess used shell=True (it doesn't, but still a risk if command construction changes).

interfaces_exported: build_queue(repo_root: Path, findings_root: Path, changed_only: bool = False, base_ref: str = 'HEAD~1') -> list[MapTask]
interfaces_consumed: garlicpress.skeleton.collect_source_files — what you call from other files
garlicpress.skeleton._python_imports — what you call from other files
explicit_requirements: File extensions are defined by INCLUDE_EXTENSIONS
MapTask contains file_path, repo_root, relative_path, last_modified, dependencies_changed_since, skeleton_path, output_path
If changed_only and is_git, filter to files in git diff
If is_git and last_mod and .py file, check if dependencies changed more recently

implicit_assumptions.assumption: The repository root contains a .git directory and git is installed and accessible in PATH.
implicit_assumptions.risk: If git is not available, _git_is_repo returns False, last_modified is None, dependency tracking is skipped, and changed_only filtering may fail silently (fallback).

implicit_assumptions.assumption: collect_source_files returns absolute paths that are relative to repo_root.
implicit_assumptions.risk: If collect_source_files returns paths relative to a different root, file_path.relative_to(repo_root) will raise ValueError, crashing build_queue.

implicit_assumptions.assumption: _python_imports returns import statements that are direct file siblings in the same repo (no third-party imports).
implicit_assumptions.risk: If imports include external modules (e.g., 'os', 'requests'), the dependency detection will create invalid file paths (e.g., 'os.py'), leading to false positives or errors.

implicit_assumptions.assumption: findings_root is writable and its parent directories exist or can be created.
implicit_assumptions.risk: If findings_root is on a read‑only filesystem or permissions are insufficient, mkdir will raise an OSError and crash the queue building.

implicit_assumptions.assumption: Callers of build_queue will not modify the returned MapTask list concurrently.
implicit_assumptions.risk: If multiple threads/processes read and modify the same list, attributes like skeleton_path or output_path could be corrupted.

implicit_assumptions.assumption: The git log --follow command works as expected and returns ISO dates in the exact format 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS +ZZZZ'.
implicit_assumptions.risk: If git log format differs (e.g., different timezone format, no space), the split(' ')[0] may produce an incorrect date or crash.

cross_file_flags: queue.py assumes garlicpress.skeleton._python_imports returns a list of import strings; verify its behavior in skeleton.py findings.
queue.py assumes garlicpress.skeleton.collect_source_files respects INCLUDE_EXTENSIONS and SKIP_DIRS; verify these constants are defined and used correctly.
MapTask attributes skeleton_path and output_path are set by runner (map_agent.py) — ensure map_agent.py writes them.
